summary.zh: 叙事工坊工作台,AI 驱动的游戏叙事内容生成管线。它用 Tier + Mode 双层路由 + Planner 动态选步,自动适配不同品类的叙事深度,覆盖 117 个品类、9 种管线模板、29 种执行模式、6 种叙事原型,生成世界观→角色→剧情→对白的完整叙事。除从需求生成外,还支持 IP DNA 改编:上传已有小说/漫画/视频作品,标准化建树后提取叙事 DNA 并复用同一套管线改编成可玩叙事。可视化故事树、单步重新生成、查看运行状态与导出结果,并能把产出对接到 Kotone 的剧情产物。
summary.en: The Narrative Studio workbench — an AI-driven game-narrative generation pipeline. Using two-layer Tier + Mode routing plus a dynamic planner, it adapts narrative depth per genre across 117 genres, 9 pipeline templates, 29 execution modes and 6 narrative archetypes, generating a full world→characters→plot→dialogue narrative. Besides generating from a prompt, it also supports IP-DNA adaptation: upload an existing novel/comic/video, standardize it into a hierarchy, extract its narrative DNA and reuse the same pipeline to adapt it into playable narrative. It offers a story-tree view, per-step regeneration, run-status tracking and result export, and connects its output to Kotone's narrative artifacts.

117 品类 / 9 模板 / 6 叙事原型

117 genres / 9 templates / 6 archetypes

body.en:
Upload an existing novel/comic/video
standardize → extract narrative DNA → adapt via the same pipeline

body.en: story tree · per-step regen · run status · export

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开「narrative」面板或对话 /narrative
body.en: Enable in Admin → open 'narrative' or type /narrative

新增 IP DNA 改编:多模态输入标准化建树 + 叙事 DNA 提取
notes.en: Added IP-DNA adaptation: multimodal input standardization + narrative-DNA extraction
